issues.message: Computed background-color value "oklab(0.999994 0.0000455678 0.0000200868 / 0.9)" on <thead> (“MemberActionProjectDate”) does not map to a known design token.
issues.suggestion: If this is intentional, ignore the warning. Otherwise, use a Marigold variant or a theme-rui token instead of a hard-coded value.

issues.message: <ActionBar> is used without any of its sub-components.
<Table> has no column marked rowHeader. Exactly one Table.Column should set rowHeader so screen readers can announce each row by it.
issues.suggestion: Add rowHeader to the column that identifies each row, e.g. <Table.Column rowHeader>Name</Table.Column>.

issues.message: <Checkbox> (a form field) is nested inside a <Table>. Tables are for tabular data, not form layout; fields lose their form semantics inside table cells.
issues.suggestion: Lay out form fields in Stack, Inline or Columns instead of a Table.

issues.message: Touch target too small at mobile (375px): a elements are 65x20px (minimum 24x24px per WCAG 2.5.8).
issues.suggestion: Increase the clickable area. Marigold interactive components have built-in minimum sizes — check if custom styling reduces the target.

issues.message: Touch target too small at mobile (375px): link elements are 76x20px (minimum 24x24px per WCAG 2.5.8).
issues.suggestion: Increase the clickable area. Marigold interactive components have built-in minimum sizes — check if custom styling reduces the target.

issues.message: Banner landmark should not be contained in another landmark (landmark-banner-is-top-level)
issues.suggestion: Place `<TopNavigation>` (renders `<header>`) at the top level of the page, not nested inside another landmark. Import from `@marigold/components`.

details.html: <header class="grid grid-cols-[auto_1fr_auto] [grid-template-areas:'start_middle_end'] [grid-area:header] sticky top-0 z-1 w-full min-h-14 bg-background border-b border-border gap-4 px-3 sm:gap-6 md:g

issues.message: Document should not have more than one banner landmark (landmark-no-duplicate-banner)
issues.suggestion: Only use one `<TopNavigation>` per page — it renders a `<header>` banner landmark.

details.html: <header class="grid grid-cols-[auto_1fr_auto] [grid-template-areas:'start_middle_end'] [grid-area:header] sticky top-0 z-1 w-full min-h-14 bg-background border-b border-border gap-4 px-3 sm:gap-6 md:g

issues.message: Landmarks should have a unique role or role/label/title (i.e. accessible name) combination (landmark-unique)
issues.suggestion: When using multiple landmark components of the same type, give each a unique `aria-label`. For example: `<Sidebar aria-label="Filters">` and `<Sidebar aria-label="Settings">`.

details.html: <header class="grid grid-cols-[auto_1fr_auto] [grid-template-areas:'start_middle_end'] [grid-area:header] sticky top-0 z-1 w-full min-h-14 bg-background border-b border-border gap-4 px-3 sm:gap-6 md:g

issues.message: Page should contain a level-one heading (page-has-heading-one)
issues.suggestion: Add a `<Headline level={1}>` component for the page title — it renders an `<h1>`. Import Headline from `@marigold/components`.

issues.message: Interactive element <a> (a) is not reachable via Tab key.
issues.suggestion: Ensure the element is focusable. Marigold interactive components are focusable by default — check if a parent has tabindex="-1" or focus is trapped.
